items.content_html: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.
items.title: obsidianmd/obsidian-releases: Community plugins list, theme list, and releases of Obsidian.

items.content_html: unofficial obsidian plugin
items.title: 3C0D/obsidian-easy-toggle-sidebars: unofficial obsidian plugin

items.content_html: The Sync Snowflake plugin seamlessly integrates Obsidian with GitLab, offering a robust solution for syncing your notes and folders to a GitLab repository. This plugin ensures your notes are backed up and version-controlled, leveraging GitLab REST-api's capabilities directly from Obsidian.
items.title: cnuebred/obsidian-snowflake: The Sync Snowflake plugin seamlessly integrates Obsidian with GitLab, offering a robust solution for syncing your notes and folders to a GitLab repository. This plugin ensures your notes are backed up and version-controlled, leveraging GitLab REST-api's capabilities directly from Obsidian.

items.content_html: A theme for the Obsidian note-taking app, with strong color to distinguish different vaults, and support for many plugins.
items.title: isaacfreeman/kakano-obsidian-theme: A theme for the Obsidian note-taking app, with strong color to distinguish different vaults, and support for many plugins.

items.content_html: a plugin that combines the PARA, Periodic, Zettelkasten organiziation methods for obsidian
items.title: FahadAlothman-fsd/obsidian-brain-os: a plugin that combines the PARA, Periodic, Zettelkasten organiziation methods for obsidian

items.content_html: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.
items.title: 4Source/settings-profiles-obsidian-plugin: This is a plugin for Obsidian (https://obsidian.md). Allows you to create various global settings profiles. You can sync them between different vaults. To keep all your settings in sync, you'll never have to manually adjust them again for every vault you have or create in the future.

items.content_html: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.
items.title: remotely-save/remotely-save: Yet another unofficial Obsidian plugin allowing users to synchronize notes between local device and the cloud service. Supports S3, Dropbox, OneDrive, webdav.

items.content_html: Obsidian Plugin for social-scientific Qualitative Data Analysis (QDA). An open alternative to MAXQDA and atlas.ti, using Markdown to store data and research codes.
